name: BHM-SST
notes: Optional paleo record. BHM is a full-field SST reconstruction published as an R .rds file. This pipeline collection adds a DERIVED global-mean annual time series extracted from the full field via cosine-latitude area weighting (reader_bhm_fullfield_to_global_mean_ts). BHM is NOT one of the six required reference SST outputs and is excluded from the strict global SST builder. Processing it requires the optional 'pyreadr' package and a manual download of the .rds (fetcher_no_url). The collection name is BHM-SST (distinct from the dashboard's BHM collection) so the dashboard's recursive metadata scan does not collide with it.

datasets.long_name: Global mean sea-surface temperature from BHM full-field reconstruction
